posts.author: phRT25 (Peter Hams)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to access the list of Monday Sales CRM product boards in Make.com when trying to create a simple Scenario.

The CRM workspace and boards are public and I am the owner. When using my admin API v2 Token to make the connection in make.com I only see a list of all my public boards in the Project Management product, but don’t see any boards listed from the Monday sales CRM product.

Does anyone know if the API v2 Token will give access to the Monday Sales CRM product boards? Note - using the search function in make.com gives no results, using the board ID or the board name.
